description_long: This humanoid robot features a smooth, rounded head with a dark visor-like faceplate and two prominent blue circular eyes, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. Its body is composed of segmented, cylindrical limbs and a robust torso, all rendered in a uniform light gray color with subtle joint details at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees. The robot's hands are stylized with three articulated fingers, and its feet are broad and flat, suggesting stability. The overall design is sleek and modern, with no visible external wiring or exposed mechanical parts, emphasizing a clean, functional aesthetic. The robot's posture is upright, with one arm raised in a gesture that could be interpreted as a wave or greeting. The construction suggests a durable, metallic shell, likely made from lightweight alloys and polymers, suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, light gray humanoid robot with a rounded head, blue eyes, and articulated limbs, standing upright and raising one hand in a greeting gesture.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, torso, and legs, with the right arm raised and the left arm relaxed.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the robot's profile, the raised right arm, and the segmented joints of the limbs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the faceplate with blue eyes, the raised right hand, and the symmetrical design of the torso and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, the raised right arm, and the articulation of the limbs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both legs straight, right arm raised and bent at the elbow in a greeting gesture, left arm relaxed at the side, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the robot has integrated, smooth panels forming its exterior shell.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a dark, visor-like plate with two prominent blue circular eyes; no visible mouth or nose, and no expressive elements beyond the eyes.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible ball and hinge joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have three articulated fingers each, suggesting a moderate range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two blue circular elements on the face, likely functioning as cameras or optical sensors; no other sensors are visible.
